channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Factory overcomes worker shortage with flexible schedules
item.description: A GE Appliances plant in rural Georgia faced a labor shortage during COVID-19. A flexible work option allowing sign-ups helped fill gaps.

item.title: Trump says US-Iran ceasefire is over at NATO summit
item.description: President Trump stated the ceasefire with Iran has ended after recent attacks between the two nations, escalating tensions.

item.title: Efforts to increase access to peptide therapies explained
item.description: These unproven treatments, promoted for longevity, are available through online grey markets. Compounding pharmacies argue for broader access.

item.title: Morning news summary
item.description: Trump states the U.S.-Iran ceasefire is over, pressure grows on Graham Platner to exit Maine Senate race, and the IOC opens the door for Russia.
